fixes_applied: eval_chi.py: Added ITI baseline to default --baselines list and wired evaluate_iti_baseline()
eval_chi.py: Clarified detector_oracle docstring — trained detector, NOT ground-truth labels
eval_chi.py: Module docstring updated to document detector_oracle limitation
train_intervention_policy.py: Documented synthetic detector confidence in extract_state_features()
configs/trace_config.yaml: Fixed oracle_detector → detector_oracle for consistency with code
run_all_experiments.sh: Stage 4 now passes --baselines explicitly including iti
run_all_experiments.sh: Added conda fallback activation alongside uv venv
README.md: Baseline list now includes ITI; detector-oracle clarified as non-ground-truth
README_RUN.md: Rewritten with correct pipeline paths (was pointing to old pilot script)
setup.sh: Added conda fallback for conda-only servers (uv preferred, conda when uv unavailable)
collect_traces.py: Fixed token-faithfulness — uses exact token IDs from generation instead of decode-retokenize cycle
collect_traces.py: Added assertion that hidden state count matches token count
train_onset_detector.py: Fixed validation leakage — group-aware split by sample_idx instead of random_split
eval_chi.py: check_factuality returns (score, method); proxy metrics clearly labeled with proxy_ prefix and proxy_ratio
tests/test_trace_hallu.py: Added 9 unit tests covering hidden-state shape consistency, label-state alignment, and group-aware split
known_limitations: Stage 3 offline policy uses synthetic detector confidence (documented; mitigated by Stage 3b online refinement)
Stage 1 traces loaded fully in memory (acceptable for ~10k traces; would need streaming for >100k)
Multi-GPU uses device_map=auto, not torchrun DDP (adequate for single-node inference)
